scripts.test:spec:carriers: vitest run tests/normalize.spec.ts tests/normalize.uniuni.spec.ts tests/normalize.ups.spec.ts tests/normalize.yunexpress.spec.ts
scripts.test:integration:carriers: vitest run tests/server.integration.spec.ts -t "routes /track/ups requests and enforces UPS token when configured|routes /track and /track/usps to USPS handler|routes /track/yunexpress requests and enforces YunExpress token when configured"
scripts.test:live:all: RUN_LIVE_USPS_TESTS=1 RUN_LIVE_UNIUNI_TESTS=1 RUN_LIVE_UPS_TESTS=1 vitest run tests/live.usps.integration.test.ts tests/live.uniuni.integration.test.ts tests/live.ups.integration.test.ts
